characters.name: open/close all folders
characters.description: Physical, Mystical, Technological: Chika is the melee fighter who uses a katana, Shito uses a pistol, and Michiru have special eyes that can detect zombiesand later is revealed to be both aSpace Masterand aReality Warper. Two Guys and a Girl: The main trio have this dynamic. Chika and Shito areRed Oni, Blue Oni, while Michiru isThe Heartand a potential a love interest for both.

characters.name: Michiru Kita
characters.description: Apocalypse Maiden:She was created to destroy theAkashic Records. Beware the Nice Ones: Chapters 46 and 47 shows this with her creating a huge contortion out of irritation. Character Development: Went fromThe Eeyoreto a more optimistic person. Conspiracy Redemption: How Michiru ends up working with Chika and Shito. Conveniently an Orphan: Lost both her parents at a young age.They're not her biological parents.

characters.name: Chika Akatsuki
characters.description: Abusive Parents:His mom. Jerk with a Heart of Gold: He's not exactly a nice person, especially in the beginning, but he does have his moments of kindness later. Missing Mom: More likeExtremelyNeglectful Mom. Mistaken for Gay: In the manga, there's a chapter that has him directly read out a love letter to Shito from someone else very loudly in front of other people. Odd Couple: Chika and Shito.

characters.name: Shito Tachibana
characters.description: Berserk Button:Poor Michiru learned it the hard way when she found Shito's comb — that belonged to his mother — and returned it to him. The very idea of someone else eventouchingthe comb enraged him. He eventually gets better, though, and lets Michiru hold onto the comb to keep it safe. Though she later breaks it. Born from a Dead Woman:His mother was already a zombie when she gave birth to him. Dead All Along:Shito was born a zombie through his mother's seven year pregnancy. Defrosting Ice King: Acts cold and aloof towards Chika and Michiru at first, but later chapters show that he's warming up to them. Heterosexual Life-Partners: Chika and Shito, albiet, unwillingly at first.

characters.name: Otsu Sawatari
characters.description: Japanese Delinquents: Looks like he'd be a member of the Yakuza. Younger Than He Looks: He's in his 20's, but looks like he's at least in his 30's. This is a major sore spot for him.

characters.name: Koyomi Yoimachi
characters.description: Heroic Sacrifice:She sacrificed herself in order to save Shito's soul. Hopeless Suitor: Koyomi has feelings for Shito, who is unaware of it.

characters.name: Yomi
characters.description: Attempted Rape: The first time Yomi meets Michiru escalates to this. Unsettling Gender-Reveal:Yomi is later revealed to be a boy, having been made from spirits of slaughtered boys of the Yoitsuhara clan.

characters.name: Lyca
characters.description: Last of His Kind: Survived the rest of his kin.

characters.name: Zen Inubashiri
characters.description: Brainwashed and Crazy:Zen is hit by Chitose's Destiny Dart and attempts to murder everyone. Florence Nightingale Effect: Zen develops a crush on Michiru after she bandages his wound. Older Than He Looks: In spite of his short height, Zen is a high school junior.

characters.name: Toko Touma
characters.description: Alliterative Name:TokoTouma. Girl Next Door: To Zensince they were both raised by the same person, but they aren't related.

characters.name: Reiichirou Shiba
characters.description: Ambiguously Bi: He has made flirty remarks towards Michiru and Chika. Face–Heel Turn:He was the one who stole the Zarame's core. Suicide Is Painless:Jumped out off of a building out of boredom. Terms of Endangerment:Is attracted to Michiru because of her "abnormality" and often calls her "cute."

characters.name: Zarame
characters.description: What Happened to the Mouse?:We never know what happened to him in the second timeline.

characters.name: Chitose
characters.description: Avenging the Villain:Chitose wants to kill Michiru to avenge Carmella's death, but he fails and has his own core stollen by his target. Eye Scream:His right eye gets damaged by Chika during a fight. Chitose stats wearing an eyepatch afterwards. Heel–Face Turn:Seems to have pulled this of in the end since he's been seen hanging around with Michiru, plus the fact that he let Michiru 'borrow his body'. Mind-Control Device: His special ability "Dart of Destiny" allows him to mind control whoever is hit by his darts.

characters.name: Carmella
characters.description: Asshole Victim:Carmella is the biggestButt-Monkeyamongst the villains, as she was backstabbed by Shiba after empowering him with Zarame's core and recruiting him to join AARC, had her own core removed by Hekka and was killed-off for good by Michiru's powers. Forgotten Fallen Friend: Downplayed.Other than Chitose, no one really misses her. Killed Off for Real:Her core got broken by Michiru, who was clearly not happy with Carmella threatening her friends. Space Master: Carmella has the power to create space distortions.
